name: GOLFTEC Canton
about: GOLFTEC Canton is a golf training facility that provides data-driven instruction using advanced technology. It offers golf lessons, club fitting services, and practice sessions in an indoor environment. Utilizing technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video, and launch monitors, the facility aims to help golfers improve their swing and game through personalized coaching. GOLFTEC operates on a lesson plan and fitting model, with services available for various skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized game plans based on swing data
Advanced launch monitor and video analysis technology
Certified PGA coaches with a data-driven approach
Indoor training bays available for practice
Custom club fitting with shaft optimization

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. However, the facility also offers club rentals and a pro shop for purchasing or trying different equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted. The facility does not have an on-site kitchen or bar service.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play a full 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time depends on the number of players and activity. Simulator play and practice sessions can vary, but a full 18-hole simulator round typically takes 1.5 to 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC welcomes juniors and youth players, offering programs and technology tailored to help young golfers improve their game.
